name: fingers-on-collar
prompt: Extreme close-up. Woman's fingers touching dark fabric of mandarin collar. Bare collar, no insignia. Fingers delicate against the fold. Soft warm light. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

name: what-she-misses
prompt: Close-up. Woman's face very close, dark hair swept back. Voice dropping, eyes warm. Seductive expression. Soft bokeh behind, dreamy blur. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

name: his-deflection
prompt: Medium shot. Dark-haired man, guarded expression, pulling back slightly. Dark eyes hard, jaw tight. Cool blue light from left, shadows on right. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

name: her-counter
prompt: Close-up. Woman's face, hand still visible at edge touching his collar. Knowing expression, pressing the point. Cool light, pressure visible in composition. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

dialogue.speaker: Valeria
dialogue.text: You don't have to stand alone in an empty room.
